title: coleosanthus glandulosus
intro: Coleosanthus glandulosus, also known as the glandular coleosanthus, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coleosanthus glandulosus include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
